# Upscalify AI

> A free, open-source image and video upscaler for macOS. It reconstructs real
> detail with Real-ESRGAN, runs entirely on-device, and never uploads your files.

## What it is
- A native Mac app (Apple Silicon or Intel). Not a web tool — you install it and run it locally.
- Images: Real-ESRGAN (the same models as Upscayl), fast 2x and high-quality 4x.
- Video: an ffmpeg Lanczos + unsharp pass that keeps the original audio.
- Free, no account, no upload. Works offline after a one-time ~42 MB model download.

## Get it
- Download: https://github.com/zakisheriff/Upscalify/releases/latest
- Source: https://github.com/zakisheriff/Upscalify

## Maker
- Built by Zaki Sheriff at The Atom (https://theatom.lk).
